newsArray.title: Ghanaian youngster Yassin Mohammed scores winner as Malmo pip Landskrona
newsArray.description: Fast-rising Ghanaian forward, Yassin Mohammed, scored on his first team debut for Swedish giants Malmo as they defeated Landskrona in a friendly. The talented teen finished off a brilliant move, slotting home in the 78th minute to seal victory for Malmo.With several of Malmo's players on international duty, Mohammed seized the moment to make a claim for first team football.He is expected to be part of the senior side for the 2026 season, which begins after the international break."It is a long season, but it is clear that it is important to start well and get a good result. We hope that all the players come home ready from the international break and are ready to play," said Malmo coach Miguel Angel Ramirez after the match.Mohammed's compatriot Isaac Anum was part of the team for the friendly on Thursday evening.Watch video below: Yassin Mohammed med matchens mål. 🎯 pic.twitter.com/wAJ0tn6tE7— Malmö FF (@Malmo_FF) March 26, 2026
keywords: ghanasoccernet.com brings to you the latest news on ghana soccer
